title: euphorbia milii var. breonii
intro: Euphorbia milii var. breonii, also known as the 'Breon's Crown of Thorns,' is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, native to Madagascar. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and support the immune system, while its extracts have been traditionally used in herbal preparations to treat digestive issues and skin problems. Euphorbia milii var. breonii is often processed into tinctures, infusions, and ointments for its medicinal use, though caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
